mapper.select:
select * from message where isShow=1
and (company like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or person like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY addTime desc
mapper.insert: insert into message(company, person, phone, email, content, isShow, addTime) values(#{company},#{person}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{content}, #{isShow}, #{addTime})
mapper.update: update message set isCall=#{isCall}, isShow=#{isShow} where id=#{id}
